message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide circle


package "cz" {
    package kkssfn{
        folder player <<Folder>> #WhiteSmoke<<folder>># {



            interface IPlayer {
                + getCoordinatesOfShips() 
                +getGuess()  
                +getName()   
                +isHuman()    
                +updateGuesses()     
                + updateGuesses()      
                
            
            }

             abstract Aplayer extends IPlayer   {
                 - coordinatesOfShips : HashMap<ShipName, ArrayList<Integer> >
                  - isHuman : boolean
                   - name : String
                
                    + getCoordinatesOfShips() 
                     +getGuess()  
                      + getName()   
                       + isHuman()    
                        + updateGuesses()     
                         + updateGuesses() 

                        
                    
                 
             
             
            
           } 


          AI --|>Aplayer
        
         Human--|>Aplayer
     
         
       
          
           
              
               
               note right of prepare::ISetShips
    
        
       endnote
      
      set up -->prepare :: ISetsShips
   
     think-->Istrategy
  
  

class Strategy implements Istrategy {
- allGuesses :ArrayList <Integer>
-allHits:Arraylist<integer>
-lastHit:int
lasthits:arrayList<integers>
myChances:int
-myguess:int
-numberofnotrandommoves:int
-rand=random
-sunkships=arraylist(shipname)




+findcoordinates ()
-update guesses ()
-updates guessess ()
-addtherightcells ()
addtoguesses ()
-alreadyguessed ()
-donotguesfourth ()
-do not gues third ()
-isNotOnBottom ()
-is Not On The Left Edge ()
-is Not on the Right edge ()
-is Not ON THE TOP ()
-shoot next to first hit again ()
-think Of What NOT TO GUESS ()
-Try Nearest Cells ()
try To Sink Carrier ()
Update Guesses ()





}







interface IStrategy {
-find Coordinates ()
-UpDateGusses ()
-UptateGuesses ()






}









set_name ..>AI

Class Set_Ships(){
-set_ships():void;
-get_coordinates_of_ships();
};

Set_up..>Sets_ships ;










' Class Player1 inherits from Sets Ships and has attributes for ship positions and methods like 'place ships', etc...
'class ShipPositioningSystem {'
'- x_coordinate:'integer'; // X position where user wants their battleship placed.'
''y-coordinate:'' integer ''; Y coordinate corresponding above mentioned battle vessel location within grid system used during gameplay session(s).''' '} ''' ''method PlaceBattleshipAtLocation(int,int):boolean;// Functionality allowing users place own vessels onto playing field according rules established earlier regarding placement restrictions imposed upon them based off current state affairs present inside game world itself!
